title: Quran, Sura 104: Al-Humaza
description: Sura 104 (Al-Humaza: The Traducer) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 104 (Al-Humaza: The Traducer) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: Woe to every scorner and mocker, who collects wealth and continuously counts it, thinking that his wealth will make him immortal.
